summary.zh-CN: 本版本改进长会话、定时任务、运行信息、移动端操作和内联结果，并新增内置 Agent Browser。
summary.en-US: This release improves long conversations, scheduled tasks, runtime details, mobile actions, and inline results, and adds a built-in Agent Browser.

body.zh-CN: 自然语言入口、常用模板、搜索筛选和分页让创建、查找和管理定时任务更直接。
body.en-US: A natural-language entry point, reusable templates, search, filters, and pagination make scheduled tasks easier to create, find, and manage.

body.zh-CN: 当已配置的搜索服务不可用时，Agent 仍可以通过浏览器工作流访问网页并检索资料。
body.en-US: Agents can still visit pages and research information through a browser workflow when a configured search service is unavailable.

body.zh-CN: 每条 AI 回复可以显示实际使用的运行时、模型和 token 用量。
body.en-US: Each AI response can show the runtime, model, and token usage actually used for that run.

body.zh-CN: 动态高度虚拟时间线按需加载更早消息，并在内容高度变化时保持阅读位置。
body.en-US: A dynamic-height virtual timeline loads earlier messages on demand and preserves reading position as content resizes.

title.zh-CN: 运行时身份和移动端入口更清楚
title.en-US: Clearer runtime identity and mobile entry points

body.zh-CN: 运行时身份在头像、侧栏和选择器中保持一致，移动端可以从聊天标题栏直接创建新任务。
body.en-US: Runtime identity stays consistent across avatars, the sidebar, and selectors, while mobile users can create a task directly from the chat header.

title.zh-CN: 内联结果和工作区界面更稳定
title.en-US: More stable inline results and workspace UI

body.zh-CN: HTML、Panel App、Mermaid 和表格在流式完成后保持稳定，导航与设置界面也更清楚。
body.en-US: HTML, Panel App, Mermaid, and table output stays stable after streaming, with clearer workspace navigation and Settings.

body.zh-CN: 历史检查记录不再导致启动检查被跳过；运行期间仍按每两小时检查。
body.en-US: Previous check timestamps no longer skip the startup check; polling continues every two hours while running.

title.zh-CN: 混合回复内容保持完整

body.zh-CN: 正文、图片和内联结果在回复完成后不再偶尔丢失，输入焦点和任务中止响应也更可靠。
body.en-US: Text, images, and inline results no longer occasionally disappear after completion, with more reliable focus and prompt cancellation behavior.

title.zh-CN: 远程 Panel App 通信恢复

body.zh-CN: 远程访问的 Panel App 桥接请求现在会携带必要头信息。
body.en-US: Panel App bridge requests over remote access now include the required headers.

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级，不需要迁移配置。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update directly through the stable channel without configuration migration.

title.zh-CN: 检查更新不会自动应用
title.en-US: Update checks do not apply updates automatically

body.zh-CN: 启动检查和每两小时检查只发现新版本，不会自动下载或应用更新。
body.en-US: Startup and two-hour checks only discover new versions; they do not download or apply updates automatically.

body.zh-CN: NextClaw Desktop 0.0.227 已提供 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 安装包；兼容最低 0.0.141 版本要求的现有桌面 launcher 也可以获取 0.26.0 runtime bundle。
body.en-US: NextClaw Desktop 0.0.227 installers are available for macOS, Windows, and Linux; existing desktop launchers compatible with the 0.0.141 floor can also receive the 0.26.0 runtime bundle.
